name: grapix
description: GrapiX broadcast graphics editor, sequencer, and renderer platform.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @grapix/shared-types && npm run build -w @grapix/api-server && npm run build -w @grapix/editor-web && npm run build -w @grapix/desktop-electron
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @grapix/shared-types && npm run typecheck -w @grapix/api-server && npm run typecheck -w @grapix/editor-web && npm run typecheck -w @grapix/desktop-electron
